summary: CNBC reported Nike would cut about 1,400 roles in global operations, mostly in technology, as part of a turnaround effort centered on technology-team reshaping, supply-chain integration, and operational modernization.
evidenceQuote: Collectively, these changes will result in a reduction of approximately 1,400 roles in global operations, with the majority in technology.
notes: Added with restrained framing. This is a meaningful include for the tracker because the cuts are concentrated in technology and tied to modernization, integration, and efficiency work, but the available reporting does not support claiming direct generative-AI replacement. Better treated as AI-adjacent restructuring than a clean explicit-AI case.

sources.name: CNBC
sources.quote: Collectively, these changes will result in a reduction of approximately 1,400 roles in global operations, with the majority in technology.
